I INTRODUCTION 
I.1 Product name  
Product name Dataset name 
OMI_HEALTH_CHL_GLOBAL_OceanColour_oligo_nag_area_mean omi_health_chl_global_omi_nag_area_mean 
OMI_HEALTH_CHL_GLOBAL_OceanColour_oligo_npg_area_mean omi_health_chl_global_omi_npg_area_mean 
OMI_HEALTH_CHL_GLOBAL_OceanColour_oligo_sag_area_mean omi_health_chl_global_omi_sag_area_mean 
OMI_HEALTH_CHL_GLOBAL_OceanColour_oligo_spg_area_mean omi_health_chl_global_omi_spg_area_mean 
I.2 Indicator evaluation method 
The CMEMS Ocean Colour OMIs are derived from the reprocessed (MY) global chlorophyll 
products generated and distributed by the CMEMS OC -TAC. The input dataset to produce  
GLOBAL MY are the spectral Rrs produced by the Plymouth Marine Laboratory (PML) using the 
ESA OC-CCI processor version 5 (OC_CCI v5) to merge at 1km resolution (rather than at 4km as 
for OC-CCI) MERIS, MODIS -AQUA, SeaWiFS, VIIRS and OLCI -S3A data. The OC -CCIv5 is based 
on the NASA reprocessing R2018.0.  The MY global was then used to compute daily and 
monthly regional mean time series. 
 
Product: OMI_HEALTH_CHL_GLOBAL_OceanColour_oligo_nag_area_mean 
Product: OMI_HEALTH_CHL_GLOBAL_OceanColour_oligo_npg_area_mean 
Product: OMI_HEALTH_CHL_GLOBAL_OceanColour_oligo_sag_area_mean 
Product: OMI_HEALTH_CHL_GLOBAL_OceanColour_oligo_spg_area_mean 
The monthly mean area (km2) with surface chlorophyll less than or equal to the gyre 
definition threshold of 0.07mg/m -3 were derived from the monthly 4km chlorophyll products 
using the ESA OC-CCI processor version 5 (OC_CCI v5) based on the NASA reprocessing 2018.0.  
Monthly gyre area estimations have been computed using an object labelling and hole filling 
algorithm.  Daily regional mean values are calculated by performing the average (weighted by 
pixel area) over these extracted areas.

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document for Ocean Monitoring Indicators related to ocean health, specifically focusing on oligotrophic gyres in the global ocean. It details the evaluation method and input datasets used for computing regional mean time series of chlorophyll-a and gyre area.
